info.name: Ardh Property Management API (Cookie Auth)
info.description: Postman Collection for ARDH Backend APIs relying strictly on HTTP-only cookies for authentication. No Bearer token headers required.

request.description: Authenticate user credentials. Backend sets the HTTP-only cookie 'token_key' upon success.
Get current profile of the logged-in user. Relies entirely on the 'token_key' cookie.
Resend a password reset OTP code. The OTP is set to 123456 by default.
Request a password reset OTP code. The OTP prints to the backend terminal log.
Verify the reset OTP code sent to your terminal.
Reset user password using verified OTP code.
Log out from the system and clear cookies.

query.description: Number of items per page (defaults to 10)
Search keyword matching Name, Email, or Phone
Filter by role. Allowed values: admin, property_manager, accountant, viewer
Filter by activity state: true or false

request.description: Retrieve all users with support for pagination, keyword search, and role/is_active filters.
Obtain single user record by their Unique ID.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Rajesh Kumar", // Full name of the user
    "email": "rajesh@example.com", // Unique email address
    "phone": "+91 9876543210", // Contact phone number
    "password": "P@ssw0rd", // Login password (minimum 6 characters)
    "confirmPassword": "P@ssw0rd", // Must match the password field
    "address": "Bangalore", // Physical home/office address
    "role": "admin", // User role: admin, property_manager, accountant, viewer
    "permissions": "dashboard,property", // Comma-separated permissions from: dashboard, property, finance, operations, admin
    "avatarURL": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde" // URL to avatar image
}

request.description: Creates a new user profile in the database. Accessible by Admin role.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Rajesh Kumar Updated", // Full name of the user
    "email": "rajesh@example.com", // Unique email address
    "phone": "+91 9876543210", // Contact phone number
    "address": "Bangalore North", // Physical home/office address
    "role": "admin", // User role: admin, property_manager, accountant, viewer
    "isActive": true, // Set to true to activate or false to deactivate user
    "permissions": "dashboard,property", // Comma-separated permissions from: dashboard, property, finance, operations, admin
    "avatarURL": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde" // URL to avatar image
}

request.description: Updates details for an existing user record.

header.description: Header to supply the admin password for deletion

request.description: Flags a user record as soft-deleted by setting the DeletedAt timestamp. Requires the Admin password.
Toggles status of the user between Active and Inactive.
